snippet.title: Mbosso - DJ  (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
'DJ' is the fuse of Afrobeats rhythms with modern three step grooves, delivering an emotional yet dance ready sound. Where as the track explores the narrative of a restless heart and a troubled mind, capturing the inner conflict of someone burdened by thoughts, pain, and emotional pressure.

Through poignant lyrics and street wise metaphors, Mbosso expresses exhaustion from tears and unspoken feelings. Amidst this emotional storm, the DJ emerges as a symbol of escape and healing, the one capable of transforming pain into rhythm and silence into sound. The recurring refrain, “Mr. DJ, turn it up,” reflects a desperate desire to drown sorrow in music and find temporary peace on the dancefloor.

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.

We hope you enjoy our videos. Have a great day!

Original Maizen Channel - @maizenofficial

Produced by a creative studio team exceeding 20 professionals, this is wholly original Minecraft entertainment. Dialogue, scenarios, world design, and narrative structure are conceived and executed in-house. Familiar characters, where included, are reimagined within new original storylines as audience-friendly visual anchors — a practice deeply rooted in modern media traditions across multiple formats. The content is built for entertainment within a healthy media mix for Minecraft viewers. It occupies a different space than educational content and merits evaluation within its own category. Its format supports age-appropriate engagement via consistent story patterns, cooperative character behavior, and transparent narrative logic. What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn
